new_claims.claim_text: Iran attacked Kuwait’s Ministry of Oil as retaliation for US/Israel actions
new_claims.notes: Unverified claim contributing to geopolitical tension.

new_claims.claim_text: US and Israel bombed petrochemical facilities in Iran
new_claims.notes: Unverified claim contributing to geopolitical tension, with comments suggesting facilities produced ballistic missile materials.

new_claims.claim_text: Al Jazeera confirmed US/Israel bombed schools and health centers in Iran, intentionally obliterating mental health hospitals and residential areas, constituting war crimes
new_claims.notes: Unverified claim contributing to geopolitical tension and humanitarian concerns.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital
new_claims.notes: Unconfirmed report, quickly challenged as false in comments, exemplifying misinformation spread.
